stemHtml: Shortly after departing an aerodrome, you hear another pilot report small birds in the vicinity. What is the potential risk to your aircraft in this situation?

options.a: Following a bird strike that damages the aircraft, it can be costly to keep the aircraft on the ground during repairs.
options.b: Due to the report, you may not be able to immediately return to the aerodrome should it become necessary.
options.c: Climb performance may be limited as ICAO rules dictate you should keep the gear down in event of birds being reported.
options.d: If you suffer a bird strike, you should continue to your destination airport.
